productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Ripple Black Flip Flops
description: Designed with a fast and sporty look, these adidas Ripple flip flops are absolutely comfortable and stylish. Slide into them and flaunt your feet with pride. Upper Thong styled rubber straps for absolute comfort with fabric toe separator for comfort wear Soft rubber footbed with print Outsole Rubber outsole with exaggerated herringbone nubs all over Flip flop care Wipe dust with a damp, clean cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
